IsDatasetReadOnly

Indicates whether the mosaic dataset is in read-only mode. Mosaic dataset operations do not perform write operations on a read-only mosaic.

virtual bool IsDatasetReadOnly { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

NewPaths

The array of possible target paths that each item is replaced with.

virtual IStringArray NewPaths { get; set; }

Returns

IStringArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

OldPaths

The array of source paths to be replaced.

virtual IStringArray OldPaths { get; set; }

Returns

IStringArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

Parameters

All parameters associated with the mosaic dataset operation.

virtual IPropertySet Parameters { get; set; }

Returns

IPropertySet

Examples

Sample Snippet

Progressor

The external progressor object associated with the mosaic dataset operation.

virtual IProgressor Progressor { get; set; }

Returns

IProgressor

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryFilter

The query filter applied on the selection set to identify the collection of catalog items on which to perform the associated operation. If no selection is specified, the query filter is applied on the entire catalog.

virtual IQueryFilter QueryFilter { get; set; }

Returns

IQueryFilter

Examples

Sample Snippet

RasterTypeInstanceIDs

The collection of raster type instances for which paths are replaced. If this property is not set, paths are replaced for only those raster type instances associated with selected mosaic dataset items.

virtual IFIDSet RasterTypeInstanceIDs { get; set; }

Returns

IFIDSet

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReplaceCachePaths

Indicates whether paths in raster dataset cache are replaced.

virtual bool ReplaceCachePaths { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReplaceCatalogItemPaths

Indicates whether paths in selected mosaic catalog items are replaced.

virtual bool ReplaceCatalogItemPaths { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReplaceConnectionFilePaths

Indicates whether paths to ACS files of the mosaic dataset are replaced.

virtual bool ReplaceConnectionFilePaths { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReplaceItemURIPaths

Indicates whether paths in item URIs are replaced.

virtual bool ReplaceItemURIPaths { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReplaceMosaicDatasetPaths

Indicates whether paths in mosaic dataset level objects are replaced.

virtual bool ReplaceMosaicDatasetPaths { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReplaceRasterFunctionTemplatePaths

Indicates whether paths in raster function templates of the mosaic dataset are replaced.

virtual bool ReplaceRasterFunctionTemplatePaths { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReplaceRasterTypePaths

Indicates whether paths in raster types are replaced.

virtual bool ReplaceRasterTypePaths { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Results

The properties of the result associated with the mosaic dataset operation.

virtual IPropertySet Results { get; set; }

Returns

IPropertySet

Sample Snippet

SelectionSet

The selection set that identifies the collection of catalog items on which to perform the associated operation.

virtual ISelectionSet SelectionSet { get; set; }
